scope.request: combined briefing page from fixture Feed Items

time_range.label: Fixture Feed Items for combined briefing page eval

scope.selection_rule: Use exactly two Artifact Topic units from the fixture: one for the dual-mode page renderer and one for evidence visibility through the Source Index. Keep the narrative-mode item as supplemental secondary coverage because the request explicitly excludes Show Script creation.

units.title: The briefing page is a complete dual-mode local artifact
units.claim: A combined Briefing Page should render Newspaper and Narrative modes in one standalone HTML file, using the reviewed Structured Synthesis as its source of truth.

supporting_evidence.title: Briefing Pages use a dual-mode renderer
supporting_evidence.reason: States that the combined page includes both Newspaper and Narrative modes, a header switch, dual mode containers, and a footer source index.

supporting_evidence.title: Narrative mode should not become a Show Script
supporting_evidence.reason: Clarifies that Narrative Briefing prose is for silent reading and should avoid host turns or spoken pacing.

units.selection_rationale: This is the lead Artifact Topic because it defines the requested artifact shape: one local page with both rendering modes and no Show Script.

units.title: Traceability stays visible without making the page feel like an audit
units.claim: The Source Index lets the page preserve evidence coverage while the body remains readable and editorial.

supporting_evidence.title: Source indexes keep evidence visible without turning pages into audits
supporting_evidence.reason: Explains that briefing pages should keep a complete source index while preserving editorial reading flow.

supporting_evidence.title: Briefing Pages use a dual-mode renderer
supporting_evidence.reason: Names the footer source index as part of the standalone combined page structure.

units.selection_rationale: This second Artifact Topic captures the evidence and source-index requirement that the rendered page must satisfy.

secondary_items.title: Narrative mode should not become a Show Script
secondary_items.reason: Relevant to the requested no-Show-Script boundary and used as supporting evidence, but not promoted into a third Artifact Topic because the eval requires exactly two units.
